title: stillingia tenella
intro: Stillingia tenella, also known as Smilax, is a plant species in the Smilacaceae family native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Stillingia tenella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat various skin conditions. Stillingia tenella can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
